surface_definitions.nonrepeat_history_query_aligned: history titles cover >=0.8 of normalized query character set
surface_definitions.repeat_query_aligned: repeat candidate title covers >=0.8 of normalized query character set
surface_definitions.repeat_query_conflict: repeat candidate title covers <=0.4 of normalized query character set
surface_definitions.threshold_role: exploratory localization only; not a paper gate or architecture threshold
surface_definitions.user_fold: sha256_utf8_user_id_integer_mod_2; fold0 discovery and fold1 replication
